controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'): (1) th
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an
NBFC'):
(1) The provisions given in Paragraphs 6 to19, 23 to 33, 50 to 51 and 53 to 57
shall apply to deposit taking NBFC (NBFC-D) registered with the RBI under
the provisions of the RBI Act,1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'): (1) th

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following
controls.control_description:
(2) The provisions given in Paragraphs 6 to19, 23 to 33 and 50 to 57 shall apply
to the following, subject to specified layer-wise applicability:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure , paragraphs 7 to 14 are not applicable for nbfc-base layer (nbfc-bl) having 'customer interface but not availing public funds'
controls.control_description:
Provided that,
Paragraphs 7 to 14 are not applicable for NBFC-Base Layer (NBFC-BL)
having 'customer interface but not availing public funds'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , paragraphs 7 to 14 are not applicable for nbfc-base layer (nbfc-bl) having 'customer interface but not availing public funds'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfcs of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for all layers
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfcs of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for all layers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfcs of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for middle layer and above
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfcs of the above-mentioned categories in sub-para (2) for middle layer and above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to infrastructure debt fund-non-banking financial company (idf-nbfc) only
controls.control_description:
(5) The provisions contained in paragraphs 58 to 60 shall be applicable to
Infrastructure Debt Fund-Non-Banking Financial Company (IDF-NBFC) only;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to infrastructure debt fund-non-banking financial company (idf-nbfc) only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to housing finance company (hfc) registered with the rbi
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to housing finance company (hfc) registered with the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc- standalone primary dealer (nbfc-spd) registered with the rbi
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc- standalone primary dealer (nbfc-spd) registered with the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-core investment company (nbfc-cic) registered with the rbi
controls.control_description:
(8) The provisions contained in Paragraphs 7 to14, 20 to 22 and 34 to 39 shall
be applicable to NBFC-Core Investment Company (NBFC-CIC) registered
with the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-core investment company (nbfc-cic) registered with the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which the nbfc currently has or previously had a loan or investmen
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which the NBFC currently has or
previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments)
anytime during the preceding twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which the nbfc currently has or previously had a loan or investmen

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description: Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve a comprehensive policy regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance redressa
controls.control_description:
The Board of an NBFC intending to undertake distribution of mutual fund products
shall approve a comprehensive policy regarding undertaking mutual funds
distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance
redressal mechanism in addition to fulfilling the other terms and conditions as
prescribed in paragraphs 50 and 51.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve a comprehensive policy regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance redressa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formulated and services should be offered to customers in accordance with this policy as prescribed in paragraph 45
controls.control_description:
A comprehensive Board approved policy
regarding undertaking insurance distribution by HFC, whether under the agency
or the broking model should be formulated and services should be offered to
customers in accordance with this policy as prescribed in paragraph 45.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be formulated and services should be offered to customers in accordance with this policy as prescribed in paragraph 45

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
An NBFC's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of
an AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all regulated entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme shall
not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks and regional rural banks)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks and regional rural banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company <image> through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where an NBFC contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF
Scheme that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a
debtor company of the NBFC, the NBFC shall be required to make 100 percent
provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company
<image>
through the AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to NBFC's direct loan and /
or investment exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company <image> through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds‒proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 10 above, where an NBFC's
contribution is in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire
investment from its capital funds‒proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2
capital (wherever applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds‒proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii
controls.control_description:
3The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions on
AIF contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 7 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read in conjunction with the guidelines issued by the foreign exchange department (fed) of the rbi and shall apply to an nbfc intending to open a
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be read in conjunction with the guidelines issued by the
Foreign Exchange Department (FED) of the RBI and shall apply to an NBFC
intending to open a, subsidiary, joint venture, or undertake investment abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be read in conjunction with the guidelines issued by the foreign exchange department (fed) of the rbi and shall apply to an nbfc intending to open a

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of the rbi for opening of subsidiary / joint venture or undertaking investment abroad
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall obtain prior approval of the RBI for opening of subsidiary / joint
venture or undertaking investment abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of the rbi for opening of subsidiary / joint venture or undertaking investment abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered subject to compliance with general and specific conditions prescribed in paragraphs 17 and 18
controls.control_description:
The application from the NBFC seeking
No Objection shall be considered subject to compliance with general and specific
conditions prescribed in paragraphs 17 and 18.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered subject to compliance with general and specific conditions prescribed in paragraphs 17 and 18

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
(2) Direct investment in activities prohibited under FEMA or in sectoral funds
shall not be permitted;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted only in entities whose core activity is regulated by a financial sector regulator in the host jurisdiction
controls.control_description:
(3) Investments shall be permitted only in entities whose core activity is
regulated by a financial sector regulator in the host jurisdiction;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted only in entities whose core activity is regulated by a financial sector regulator in the host jurisdiction

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 percent of the nbfc's net owned fund (nof)
controls.control_description:
(4) The aggregate overseas investment shall not exceed 100 percent of the
NBFC's Net Owned Fund (NOF).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 100 percent of the nbfc's net owned fund (nof)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 15 percent of the nbfc's owned funds
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 15 percent of the nbfc's owned funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve multi-layered, cross jurisdictional structures and at most only a single intermediate holding entity shall be permitted
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve multi-layered, cross jurisdictional structures and at most only a single intermediate holding entity shall be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not less than the regulatory prescriptions
controls.control_description:
(6) The CRAR / leverage of the NBFC, post investment in subsidiary abroad
shall be not less than the regulatory prescriptions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not less than the regulatory prescriptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed subsidiary / investment abroad as prescribed in the exp
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed subsidiary / investment abroad as prescribed in the exp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than five percent of the net advances
controls.control_description:
(8) The level of Net Non-Performing Assets of the NBFC shall not be more than
five percent of the net advances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than five percent of the net advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been in profit for the last three financial years and shall have demonstrated satisfactory performance during the period of its existence
controls.control_description:
<image>
(9) An NBFC shall have been in profit for the last three financial years and shall
have demonstrated satisfactory performance during the period of its
existence;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been in profit for the last three financial years and shall have demonstrated satisfactory performance during the period of its existence

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the regulations issued under fema,1999 from time to time
controls.control_description:
(10) An NBFC shall comply with the regulations issued under FEMA,1999 from
time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the regulations issued under fema,1999 from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be satisfactory
controls.control_description:
(11) An NBFC's overall regulatory compliance, including servicing of public
deposits, if held by the NBFC, shall be satisfactory;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the kyc guidelines
controls.control_description: (12) An NBFC shall comply with the KYC guidelines;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the kyc guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as investment or subsidiary / joint venture abroad, depending upon percentage of investment in overseas entity
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as investment or subsidiary / joint venture abroad, depending upon percentage of investment in overseas entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit annual certificate from the statutory to the regional office of department of supervision of the rbi where it is registered, certifying that it
controls.control_description:
(14) An NBFC shall submit annual certificate from the statutory to the Regional
Office of Department of Supervision of the RBI where it is registered,
certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under
these Directions for overseas investment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit annual certificate from the statutory to the regional office of department of supervision of the rbi where it is registered, certifying that it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to this condition
controls.control_description:
All approvals for
investment abroad shall be subject to this condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to this condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with all the conditions as stipulated in paragraph 16 above
controls.control_description:
An NBFC proposing to establish a subsidiary abroad shall comply with all the
conditions as stipulated in paragraph 16 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with all the conditions as stipulated in paragraph 16 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend implicit or explicit guarantee to or on behalf of such subsidiaries
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend implicit or explicit guarantee to or on behalf of such subsidiaries

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
(2) No request for issuance of a letter of comfort in favour of the subsidiary
abroad from any institution in India shall be permitted;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to its either equity or fund-based commitment to the subsidiary
controls.control_description:
(3) The liability of the NBFC in the proposed overseas entity shall be limited to
its either equity or fund-based commitment to the subsidiary;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to its either equity or fund-based commitment to the subsidiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a shell company
controls.control_description: (4) The overseas subsidiary shall not be a shell company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a shell company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as shell companies
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as shell companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as a vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in india for the indian operations
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) The overseas subsidiary shall not be used as a vehicle for raising resources
for creating assets in India for the Indian operations;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as a vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in india for the indian operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain periodical reports / audit reports about the business undertaken by the subsidiary abroad and shall make them available to the rbi and inspecti
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain periodical reports / audit reports about the business undertaken by the subsidiary abroad and shall make them available to the rbi and inspecti

controls.control_objective: To ensure review or withdraw the approval given for setting up a subsidiary abroad
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review or withdraw the approval given for setting up a subsidiary abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure make disclosure in its balance sheet to the effect that liability of the parent entity in the proposed overseas entity is limited to its either equity
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make disclosure in its balance sheet to the effect that liability of the parent entity in the proposed overseas entity is limited to its either equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to regulatory prescriptions of the host country
controls.control_description:
and
(9) All the operations of the subsidiary abroad shall be subject to regulatory
prescriptions of the host country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to regulatory prescriptions of the host country

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the same guidelines as applicable to subsidiaries established abroad, as specified in these directions
controls.control_description:
All overseas investments by an NBFC, other than in subsidiaries, shall be
governed by the same guidelines as applicable to subsidiaries established abroad,
as specified in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be governed by the same guidelines as applicable to subsidiaries established abroad, as specified in these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval from the bank
controls.control_description:
All CICs investing in Joint
Venture/Subsidiary overseas in the financial sector shall require prior approval
from the Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval from the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold a certificate of registration (cor) from the bank and shall comply with all the regulations applicable to cic
controls.control_description:
CICs desirous of making overseas investment in financial sector
shall hold a Certificate of Registration (CoR) from the Bank and shall comply with
all the regulations applicable to CIC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold a certificate of registration (cor) from the bank and shall comply with all the regulations applicable to cic

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be registered with the bank and shall be regulated like a registered cic
controls.control_description:
CICs that are presently exempted from the
regulatory framework of the Bank (unregistered CICs), shall be required to be
registered with the Bank and shall be regulated like a registered CIC, where they
intend to make overseas investment in financial sector
6 Financial sector for this purpose would mean a sector/service regulated by a Financial Sector
Regulator
<image>
A.2.2 Investment in non-financial sector
21.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be registered with the bank and shall be regulated like a registered cic

controls.control_objective: To ensure require registration from the bank and hence, these directions are not applicable to them
controls.control_description:
Unregistered CICs making overseas investment in non-financial sector shall not
require registration from the Bank and hence, these Directions are not applicable
to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require registration from the bank and hence, these directions are not applicable to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the regional office of dos where it is registered within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated format and at the prescribed periodici
controls.control_description:
However, it shall report to the Regional Office
of DoS where it is registered within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated
format and at the prescribed periodicity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the regional office of dos where it is registered within 30 days of such investment in the stipulated format and at the prescribed periodici

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 30% of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as on the date of the last
controls.control_description:
(i) The Adjusted Net Worth (ANW) of the CIC shall not be less than 30% of
its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted
value of off-balance sheet items as on the date of the last audited balance
sheet as at the end of the financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 30% of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as on the date of the last

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to meet the requirement of minimum anw, post overseas investment
controls.control_description:
The CIC shall continue to meet
the requirement of minimum ANW, post overseas investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to meet the requirement of minimum anw, post overseas investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as provided for in the directions
controls.control_description:
For this
purpose, the risk weights applicable shall be as provided for in the
directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as provided for in the directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 1% of the net advances as on the date of the last audited balance sheet
controls.control_description:
(ii) The level of Net Non-Performing Assets of the CIC shall not be more than
1% of the net advances as on the date of the last audited balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 1% of the net advances as on the date of the last audited balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally be earning profit continuously for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory during the period of its existence
controls.control_description:
(iii) The CIC shall generally be earning profit continuously for the last three
years and its performance shall be satisfactory during the period of its
existence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally be earning profit continuously for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory during the period of its existence

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
(i) Direct investment in activities prohibited under FEMA shall not be
permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 400% of the owned funds of the cic
controls.control_description:
(ii) The total overseas investment shall not exceed 400% of the owned funds
of the CIC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 400% of the owned funds of the cic

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 200% of its owned funds
controls.control_description:
(iii) The total overseas investment in financial sector shall not exceed 200%
of its owned funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 200% of its owned funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only in regulated entities abroad
controls.control_description: (iv) Investment in financial sector shall be only in regulated entities abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only in regulated entities abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as wholly owned subsidiaries (wos) /joint ventures (jv) abroad
controls.control_description:
(v) Entities set up abroad or acquired abroad shall be treated as wholly owned
subsidiaries (WOS) /joint ventures (JV) abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as wholly owned subsidiaries (wos) /joint ventures (jv) abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to its financial commitment
controls.control_description:
(vi) Overseas investments by a CIC in financial /non-financial sector shall be
restricted to its financial commitment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to its financial commitment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted:
controls.control_description:
However, with regard to issuing
guarantees/Letter of Comfort in this regard the following shall be noted:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted:

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in creation of complex structures
controls.control_description:
(b) CICs must ensure that investments made overseas shall not result
in creation of complex structures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in creation of complex structures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than two tiers in the structure
controls.control_description:
In case the structure overseas
requires a Non-Operating Holding Company, there shall not be more
than two tiers in the structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than two tiers in the structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the same to the bank for a review
controls.control_description:
CICs having more than one non-
operating holding company in existence, in their investment
structure, shall report the same to the Bank for a review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the same to the bank for a review

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the regulations issued under fema, 1999 from time to time
controls.control_description:
(c) CICs shall comply with the regulations issued under FEMA, 1999
from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the regulations issued under fema, 1999 from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the cic to the regional office of dos where it is registered, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated
controls.control_description:
(d) An annual certificate from statutory auditors shall be submitted by
the CIC to the Regional Office of DoS where it is registered, certifying
that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated under these
Guidelines for overseas investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the cic to the regional office of dos where it is registered, certifying that it has fully complied with all the conditions stipulated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by april 30 each year
controls.control_description:
The certificate as on end March
every year shall be submitted by April 30 each year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by april 30 each year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be withdrawn
controls.control_description:
(e) If any serious adverse features come to the notice of the Bank, the
permission granted shall be withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to this condition
controls.control_description:
All approvals for investment
abroad shall be subject to this condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to this condition
