controls.control_description:
(i) In the case of opening of a WOS/JV abroad by a CIC, all the conditions as
stipulated above shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all cics:
controls.control_description:
In addition, the
following conditions shall apply to all CICs:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all cics:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a shell company i
controls.control_description:
(a) The WOS/JV being established abroad shall not be a shell company
i.e., "a company that is incorporated, but has no significant assets or
operations." However, companies undertaking activities such as
financial consultancy and advisory services shall not be considered
as shell companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a shell company i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as a vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in india for the indian operations
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as a vehicle for raising resources for creating assets in india for the indian operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain periodical reports/audit reports at least quarterly about the business undertaken by the wos/jv abroad and shall make them available to the ins
controls.control_description:
(c) In order to ensure compliance of the provisions, the parent CIC shall
obtain periodical reports/audit reports at least quarterly about the
business undertaken by the WOS/JV abroad and shall make them
available to the inspecting officials of the Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain periodical reports/audit reports at least quarterly about the business undertaken by the wos/jv abroad and shall make them available to the ins

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed

controls.control_objective: To ensure make disclosure in its balance sheet the amount of liability of the parent entity towards it and also whether it is limited to equity / loan or if gua
controls.control_description:
(e) The WOS/JV shall make disclosure in its Balance Sheet the amount
of liability of the parent entity towards it and also whether it is limited
to equity / loan or if guarantees are given, the nature of such
guarantees and the amount involved;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make disclosure in its balance sheet the amount of liability of the parent entity towards it and also whether it is limited to equity / loan or if gua

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to regulatory prescriptions of the host country
controls.control_description:
(f) All the operations of the WOS/JV abroad shall be subject to
regulatory prescriptions of the host country.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to regulatory prescriptions of the host country

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to undertake only those activities that are permissible under the automatic route
controls.control_description:
An NBFC receiving Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) under the automatic route
shall be permitted to undertake only those activities that are permissible under the
automatic route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to undertake only those activities that are permissible under the automatic route

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the prior approval of the foreign investment promotion board (fipb)
controls.control_description:
Diversification into any other activity shall require the prior approval of the Foreign
Investment Promotion Board (FIPB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the prior approval of the foreign investment promotion board (fipb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with all applicable regulations including minimum capitalization norms
controls.control_description:
A company which has entered into a permissible FDI activity (e.g., software) and
later seeks to diversify into the NBFC sector shall comply with all applicable
regulations including minimum capitalization norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with all applicable regulations including minimum capitalization norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application for entry into the insurance business, along with necessary particulars duly certified by its statutory auditors, through pravaah
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall make an application for entry into the insurance business, along
with necessary particulars duly certified by its statutory auditors, through
PRAVAAH Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation
(DoR), Central Office, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application for entry into the insurance business, along with necessary particulars duly certified by its statutory auditors, through pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to conduct such business departmentally
controls.control_description: An NBFC shall not be allowed to conduct such business departmentally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to conduct such business departmentally

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally be allowed to join the insurance company on a risk participation basis
controls.control_description:
A
subsidiary or company in the same group of an NBFC or of another NBFC
engaged in the business of a non-banking financial institution or banking business
shall not normally be allowed to join the insurance company on a risk participation
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally be allowed to join the insurance company on a risk participation basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold more than 50 percent of the paid-up capital of the jv insurance company
controls.control_description:
An NBFC registered with the RBI shall be permitted to set up a joint venture (JV)
company for undertaking insurance business with risk participation subject to the
following conditions:
(1) An NBFC shall not hold more than 50 percent of the paid-up capital of the JV
insurance company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold more than 50 percent of the paid-up capital of the jv insurance company

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a selective basis, permit a higher equity contribution by a promoter nbfc initially
controls.control_description:
The RBI may, on a selective basis, permit a higher
equity contribution by a promoter NBFC initially, subject to divestment of
equity within the prescribed period [see Note (1) below].
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on a selective basis, permit a higher equity contribution by a promoter nbfc initially

controls.control_objective: To ensure be counted for the limit of 50 percent prescribed for the nbfc in an insurance jv
controls.control_description:
(2) In case more than one company (irrespective of doing financial activity or
not) in the same group of the NBFC wishes to take a stake in the insurance
company, the contribution by all companies in the same group shall be
counted for the limit of 50 percent prescribed for the NBFC in an insurance
JV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be counted for the limit of 50 percent prescribed for the nbfc in an insurance jv

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a case-to-case basis, consider need-based relaxation of the 50 percent group limit as specified
controls.control_description:
(3) In case of capital infusion calls by IRDAI, into the Insurance JV company, the
RBI may, on a case-to-case basis, consider need-based relaxation of the 50
percent group limit as specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to , on a case-to-case basis, consider need-based relaxation of the 50 percent group limit as specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to compliance by the nbfc with all regulatory conditions as prescribed in these directions and such other conditions as may be necessary in
controls.control_description:
Relaxation, if permitted, shall be subject to
compliance by the NBFC with all regulatory conditions as prescribed in these
Directions and such other conditions as may be necessary in the specific
case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to compliance by the nbfc with all regulatory conditions as prescribed in these directions and such other conditions as may be necessary in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the nbfc through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
Application for such relaxation along with supporting documents shall
be submitted by the NBFC through PRAVAAH Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation (DoR), Central
Office, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the nbfc through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the following eligibility criteria for the joint venture: note: (1) holding of equity by a promoter nbfc in an insurance company or participation
controls.control_description:
(4) An NBFC shall meet the following eligibility criteria for the joint venture:
Note:
(1) Holding of equity by a promoter NBFC in an insurance company or
participation in any form in insurance business shall be subject to compliance
with any rules and regulations laid down by the IRDAI / Central Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the following eligibility criteria for the joint venture: note: (1) holding of equity by a promoter nbfc in an insurance company or participation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned with reference to the latest available audited balance sheet for the previous year
controls.control_description:
(2) The eligibility criteria shall be reckoned with reference to the latest available
audited balance sheet for the previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned with reference to the latest available audited balance sheet for the previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to compliance with any rules and regulations laid down by the irda/central government
controls.control_description:
Notes:
(1) Holding of equity by a promoter CIC in an insurance company or investment
in insurance business shall be subject to compliance with any rules and
regulations laid down by the IRDA/Central Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to compliance with any rules and regulations laid down by the irda/central government

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than ₹500 crore
controls.control_description: (i) The owned fund of the NBFC shall not be less than ₹500 crore,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than ₹500 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not less than 15 percent
controls.control_description: (ii) The CRAR of the NBFC shall be not less than 15 percent,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not less than 15 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not more than five percent of the total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances taken together, <image>
controls.control_description:
(iii) The level of net non-performing assets shall be not more than five
percent of the total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and
advances taken together,
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not more than five percent of the total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances taken together, <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made net profit in the preceding three consecutive financial years
controls.control_description:
(iv) An NBFC shall have made net profit in the preceding three consecutive
financial years,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made net profit in the preceding three consecutive financial years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be satisfactory
controls.control_description:
(v) The track record of the performance of the subsidiaries, if any, of the
concerned NBFC shall be satisfactory,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for such investments while computing nof of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
The provisions of the RBI Act, 1934 shall be applicable
for such investments while computing NOF of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for such investments while computing nof of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
In case where a foreign partner contributes 26 percent of the insurance JV's equity
with the approval of IRDAI / Foreign Investment Promotion Board, participation by
more than one NBFC in the equity of the insurance JV may be permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to participate in such cases
controls.control_description:
Only
NBFCs satisfying the criteria given in paragraph 28 above, shall be eligible to
participate in such cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to participate in such cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 15 percent
controls.control_description:
An NBFC not eligible to participate as JV partner, as above can make investments
up to 10 percent of the owned fund of the NBFC or ₹50 crore, whichever is lower,
in the insurance company, subject to the following conditions:
(1) The CRAR of the NBFC shall not be less than 15 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 15 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not more than five percent of total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances
controls.control_description:
(2) The level of net NPA shall be not more than five percent of total outstanding
leased / hire purchase assets and advances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not more than five percent of total outstanding leased / hire purchase assets and advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been in net profit in the preceding three consecutive financial years
controls.control_description:
(3) NBFC shall have been in net profit in the preceding three consecutive
financial years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been in net profit in the preceding three consecutive financial years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an investment and shall be without any contingent liability for the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Such participation shall be treated as an investment and shall be without any
contingent liability for the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an investment and shall be without any contingent liability for the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure take up insurance agency business on fee basis and without any risk participation, without the approval of the bank
controls.control_description:
Taking up Insurance Agency Business
HFCs having Net Owned Fund (NOF) of not less than the prescribed NOF may
take up insurance agency business on fee basis and without any risk participation,
without the approval of the Bank, subject to the following conditions:
(1) The HFC should obtain requisite permission from Insurance Regulatory and
Development Authority (IRDA) and comply with the IRDA regulations for
acting as 'composite corporate agent' with insurance companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take up insurance agency business on fee basis and without any risk participation, without the approval of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to go in only for a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed by it
controls.control_description:
(2) The HFC should not adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to
go in only for a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed
by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of forcing its customers to go in only for a particular insurance company in respect of assets financed by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to exercise their own choice
controls.control_description: The customers should be allowed to exercise their own choice;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to exercise their own choice

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stated in all publicity material distributed by it in a prominent way
controls.control_description:
(3) As the participation by a HFC's customer in insurance products is purely on
a voluntary basis, it should be stated in all publicity material distributed by it
in a prominent way.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be stated in all publicity material distributed by it in a prominent way

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provision of financial services offered by the hfc to its customers and use of the insurance pro
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provision of financial services offered by the hfc to its customers and use of the insurance pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid by the insured directly to the insurance company without routing through the hfc
controls.control_description:
(4) The premium should be paid by the insured directly to the insurance
company without routing through the HFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid by the insured directly to the insurance company without routing through the hfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure get transferred to the business of the hfc
controls.control_description:
and
(5) The risks, if any, involved in insurance agency should not get transferred to
the business of the HFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get transferred to the business of the hfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit a higher equity contribution by a promoter hfc initially, pending divestment of equity within the prescribed period
controls.control_description:
On
a selective basis, the Bank may permit a higher equity contribution by a
promoter HFC initially, pending divestment of equity within the prescribed
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit a higher equity contribution by a promoter hfc initially, pending divestment of equity within the prescribed period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than ₹500 crore
controls.control_description: (i) The NOF of the HFC should not be less than ₹500 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than ₹500 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not less than 12%
controls.control_description: (ii) The CRAR of the HFC should be not less than 12%;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not less than 12%

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not more than 3% of the total outstanding assets, including loans and advances taken together
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not more than 3% of the total outstanding assets, including loans and advances taken together

controls.control_objective: To ensure have net profit for the last three continuous years
controls.control_description: (iv) The HFC should have net profit for the last three continuous years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have net profit for the last three continuous years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be satisfactory
controls.control_description:
(v) The track record of the performance of the subsidiaries, if any, of the
concerned HFC should be satisfactory;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to participate in the equity of the insurance jv company
controls.control_description:
(2) In case where a foreign partner contributes 26 per cent of the equity with the
approval of IRDA/ Foreign Investment Promotion Board, more than one HFC
may be allowed to participate in the equity of the Insurance JV Company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to participate in the equity of the insurance jv company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be counted for the limit of 50 per cent prescribed for the hfc in an insurance jv company
controls.control_description:
(3) In case more than one company (irrespective of doing financial activity or
not) in the same group of the HFC wishes to take a stake in the insurance
company, the contribution by all companies in the same group shall be
counted for the limit of 50 per cent prescribed for the HFC in an Insurance
JV Company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be counted for the limit of 50 per cent prescribed for the hfc in an insurance jv company

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a case to case basis, consider need based relaxation of the 50% group limit specified above
controls.control_description:
(4) In cases where IRDA issues calls for capital infusion into the Insurance JV
Company, the Bank may, on a case to case basis, consider need based
relaxation of the 50% group limit specified above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to , on a case to case basis, consider need based relaxation of the 50% group limit specified above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary in the specific case
controls.control_description:
The relaxation, if permitted,
will be subject to compliance by the HFC with all regulatory conditions
specified under the guidelines and such other conditions as may be
necessary in the specific case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary in the specific case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an investment and should be without any contingent liability for the hfc
controls.control_description:
Such
participation shall be treated as an investment and should be without any
contingent liability for the HFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an investment and should be without any contingent liability for the hfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than ₹100 crore
controls.control_description: (i) The NOF of the HFC should not be less than ₹100 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than ₹100 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be not more than 3% of the total outstanding assets taken together
controls.control_description:
(iii) The level of net non-performing assets should be not more than 3% of the
total outstanding assets taken together;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be not more than 3% of the total outstanding assets taken together

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise from insurance business
controls.control_description:
It should be ensured that risks involved in insurance business
do not get transferred to the HFC and that the HFC business does not get
contaminated by any risks which may arise from insurance business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise from insurance business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an 'arms-length' relationship between the hfcs and the insurance outfit
controls.control_description:
There should
be an 'arms-length' relationship between the HFCs and the insurance outfit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an 'arms-length' relationship between the hfcs and the insurance outfit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formulated, and services should be offered to customers in accordance with <image> this policy
controls.control_description:
Board Approved Policy
(1) A comprehensive Board approved policy regarding undertaking insurance
distribution, whether under the agency or the broking model should be
formulated, and services should be offered to customers in accordance with
<image>
this policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be formulated, and services should be offered to customers in accordance with <image> this policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that as irda guidelines do not permit group entities to take up both corporate agency and broking in the same group even through separate ent
controls.control_description:
It may be
noted that as IRDA Guidelines do not permit group entities to take up both
corporate agency and broking in the same group even through separate
entities, HFCs or their group entities may undertake either insurance broking
or corporate agency business.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be noted that as irda guidelines do not permit group entities to take up both corporate agency and broking in the same group even through separate ent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with by hfcs undertaking these activities
controls.control_description:
Compliance with IRDA Guidelines
(1) The IRDA (Licensing of Corporate Agents) Regulations, 2002, as amended
from time to time, as applicable, should be complied with by HFCs
undertaking these activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with by hfcs undertaking these activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank
controls.control_description:
(2) The deposit to be maintained by an insurance broker as per the IRDA
(Licensing of Banks as Insurance Brokers) Regulations, 2013, as amended
from time to time, should be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the following in view: (1) all employees dealing with insurance agency/ broking business should possess the requisite qualification prescribed by
controls.control_description:
Ensuring Customer Appropriateness and Suitability
While undertaking insurance distribution business, either under the corporate
agency or broking model under the relevant IRDA Regulations, HFCs must keep
the following in view:
(1) All employees dealing with insurance agency/ broking business should
possess the requisite qualification prescribed by IRDA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the following in view: (1) all employees dealing with insurance agency/ broking business should possess the requisite qualification prescribed by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a system of assessment of the suitability of products for customers
controls.control_description:
(2) There should be a system of assessment of the suitability of products for
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a system of assessment of the suitability of products for customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that there is a standardized system of assessing the needs of the customer and that initiation/ transactional and approval processes are se
controls.control_description:
It should be ensured that there is a
standardized system of assessing the needs of the customer and that
initiation/ transactional and approval processes are segregated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that there is a standardized system of assessing the needs of the customer and that initiation/ transactional and approval processes are se

controls.control_objective: To ensure treat their customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold
controls.control_description:
(3) HFCs should treat their customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with
regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to treat their customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to adhere to the following stipulations: <image> (1) operational aspects
controls.control_description:
An NBFC desirous of undertaking distributing mutual funds, shall be required to
adhere to the following stipulations:
<image>
(1) Operational Aspects
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to adhere to the following stipulations: <image> (1) operational aspects

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the sebi guidelines / regulations, including its code of conduct, for distribution of mutual fund products
controls.control_description:
(i) An NBFC shall comply with the SEBI guidelines / regulations, including
its code of conduct, for distribution of mutual fund products;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the sebi guidelines / regulations, including its code of conduct, for distribution of mutual fund products

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular mutual fund product sponsored by it
controls.control_description:
(ii) An NBFC shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its
customers to opt for a particular mutual fund product sponsored by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling its customers to opt for a particular mutual fund product sponsored by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to exercise their own choice
controls.control_description: Its customers shall be allowed to exercise their own choice;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to exercise their own choice

controls.control_objective: To ensure prominently state that the participation by its customers in mutual fund products is purely on a voluntary basis
controls.control_description:
(iii) All publicity materials shall prominently state that the participation by its
customers in mutual fund products is purely on a voluntary basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prominently state that the participation by its customers in mutual fund products is purely on a voluntary basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provisions of financial services offered by the nbfc to its customers and distribution of the mu
controls.control_description:
There
shall be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provisions of
financial services offered by the NBFC to its customers and distribution
of the mutual fund products;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no 'linkage' either direct or indirect between the provisions of financial services offered by the nbfc to its customers and distribution of the mu

controls.control_objective: To ensure only act as an agent of its customers, forwarding their applications for purchase / sale of mf units together with the payment instruments, to the mut
controls.control_description:
(iv) An NBFC shall only act as an agent of its customers, forwarding their
applications for purchase / sale of MF units together with the payment
instruments, to the Mutual Fund / the Registrars / the transfer agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only act as an agent of its customers, forwarding their applications for purchase / sale of mf units together with the payment instruments, to the mut

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the customers' risk and without the nbfc guaranteeing any assured return
controls.control_description:
The purchase of units shall be at the customers' risk and without the
NBFC guaranteeing any assured return;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at the customers' risk and without the nbfc guaranteeing any assured return

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither acquire units of mutual funds from the secondary market for sale to its customers, nor shall it buy back units of mutual funds from its custom
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither acquire units of mutual funds from the secondary market for sale to its customers, nor shall it buy back units of mutual funds from its custom

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its own investments and the investments belonging to its customers are kept distinct from each other
controls.control_description:
(vi) In case the NBFC is holding custody of MF units on behalf of its
customers, it shall ensure that its own investments and the investments
belonging to its customers are kept distinct from each other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its own investments and the investments belonging to its customers are kept distinct from each other

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well a
controls.control_description:
(i) An NBFC shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy
regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer
appropriateness and suitability as well as grievance redressal
mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy regarding undertaking mutual funds distribution, customer appropriateness and suitability as well a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered to its customers in accordance with this policy
controls.control_description:
The services relating to the same shall be offered to its
customers in accordance with this policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be offered to its customers in accordance with this policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with by the nbfc undertaking this activity
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with by the nbfc undertaking this activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhering to kyc guidelines and provisions of prevention of money laundering act, 2002
controls.control_description:
(ii) An NBFC shall be adhering to KYC guidelines and provisions of
Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be adhering to kyc guidelines and provisions of prevention of money laundering act, 2002

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with other terms and conditions as the rbi may specify in this regard from time to time
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall comply with other terms and conditions as the RBI may specify in
this regard from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with other terms and conditions as the rbi may specify in this regard from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as sub-agent under mtss without prior approval of the rbi
controls.control_description:
A non-deposit accepting NBFC may act as sub-agent under MTSS without prior
approval of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as sub-agent under mtss without prior approval of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake such activity
controls.control_description: Deposit accepting NBFC shall not undertake such activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake such activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake point of presence (pop) services for national pension system (nps) under pension fund regulatory and development authority
controls.control_description:
An NBFC in the Base Layer shall not undertake Point of Presence (PoP) services
for National Pension System (NPS) under Pension Fund Regulatory and
Development Authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake point of presence (pop) services for national pension system (nps) under pension fund regulatory and development authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to undertake pop services under pfrda for nps after registration with pfrda
controls.control_description:
An NBFC (other than Base Layer NBFC) complying with the prescribed CRAR and
have made net profit in the preceding financial year shall be permitted to undertake
PoP services under PFRDA for NPS after registration with PFRDA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to undertake pop services under pfrda for nps after registration with pfrda

controls.control_objective: To ensure deposit the nps subscription collected by them from the public on the day of collection itself (t+0 basis
controls.control_description:
An eligible NBFC extending such services shall deposit the NPS subscription
collected by them from the public on the day of collection itself (T+0 basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deposit the nps subscription collected by them from the public on the day of collection itself (t+0 basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to the guidelines framed by pfrda
controls.control_description:
An NBFC conducting PoP services shall strictly adhere to the guidelines framed
by PFRDA.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to strictly adhere to the guidelines framed by pfrda

controls.control_objective: To ensure invite supervisory action, including but not limited to cancellation of permission to undertake pop services
controls.control_description:
Any violation of the above instructions shall invite supervisory action, including but
not limited to cancellation of permission to undertake PoP services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invite supervisory action, including but not limited to cancellation of permission to undertake pop services

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established either as: (1) a trust, registered as an idf-mutual fund and regulated by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established either as: (1) a trust, registered as an idf-mutual fund and regulated by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by sebi regulations for mutual funds) idf-mfs with prior approval of the rbi subject to the following c
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by SEBI Regulations
for Mutual Funds) IDF-MFs with prior approval of the RBI subject to the following
conditions (based on the audited financial statements), in addition to those
prescribed by SEBI:
(1) An NBFC shall have a minimum NOF of ₹300 crore and CRAR of 15 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by sebi regulations for mutual funds) idf-mfs with prior approval of the rbi subject to the following c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than three percent of the net advances
controls.control_description: (2) Its net NPAs shall be less than three percent of the net advances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than three percent of the net advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been in existence for at least five years
controls.control_description: (3) It shall have been in existence for at least five years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been in existence for at least five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory
controls.control_description:
(4) It shall be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be
satisfactory;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the regulatory minimum prescribed for it
controls.control_description:
(5) The CRAR of the NBFC post investment in the IDF-MF shall not be less than
the regulatory minimum prescribed for it;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the regulatory minimum prescribed for it

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed idf-mf
controls.control_description:
(6) An NBFC shall continue to maintain the required level of NOF after
accounting for investment in the proposed IDF-MF;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed idf-mf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no supervisory concerns with respect to the nbfc
controls.control_description:
and
(7) There shall be no supervisory concerns with respect to the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no supervisory concerns with respect to the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the department of regulation of the rbi, for prior approval to sponsor idf-mfs
controls.control_description:
An NBFC that fulfils the eligibility criteria as above shall approach the Department
of Regulation of the RBI, for prior approval to sponsor IDF-MFs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the department of regulation of the rbi, for prior approval to sponsor idf-mfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the applicable provisions stipulated under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025, up
controls.control_description:
Scheduled Commercial Bank should adhere to the applicable provisions stipulated
under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Undertaking of financial services)
Directions, 2025, updated from time to time, in case a particular business/activity is being
undertaking by both the NBFC as well as its parent bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the applicable provisions stipulated under reserve bank of india (commercial banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025, up

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof, unless otherwise specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals
or acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
